title: Cboe Global Markets Completes 50th Anniversary Donation Commitment With $100,000 Donation to Doctors Without Borders
text: CHICAGO , Aug. 30, 2023  /PRNewswire/ -- Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), the world's leading derivatives and securities exchange network, today announced a donation of $100,000 to Doctors Without Borders/Médecins Sans Frontières (MSF), an international medical humanitarian organization dedicated to delivering emergency medical aid to people in crisis. The charitable giving accomplishes Cboe's commitment to donating an aggregate total of $500,000 to five different non-profit organizations in honor of its 50th anniversary milestone.

title: Cboe Global (CBOE) Rises 19% YTD: Will the Bull Run Continue?
text: Strong market position, global reach, strength in its proprietary products and solid capital position continue to drive Cboe Global (CBOE).

title: The Reasons I Like Cboe Global Markets
text: Cboe Global Markets is a leading provider of market infrastructure, with a strong position in options and stock exchange operations. The company benefits from volatility and has catalysts for future growth, such as pending approvals and new customers. CBOE has a solid capital allocation strategy, little downside risk, and generates recurring revenue from transaction fees.

title: Cboe Global (CBOE) Shares More Profits, Ups Dividend by 10%
text: Cboe Global's (CBOE) 10% dividend hike reflects its intention to enhance shareholder value, which is supported by its strong financial position.

title: Cboe Global Markets Declares Increased Third-Quarter 2023 Dividend
text: Quarterly cash dividend increased 10 percent to $0.55 per share 13th consecutive year Cboe has increased its dividend CHICAGO , Aug. 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), the world's leading derivatives and securities exchange network, today announced its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.55 per share of common stock for the third quarter of 2023, representing a 10 percent increase from the prior quarter's dividend of $0.50 per share. The third-quarter 2023 dividend is payable on September 15, 2023, to stockholders of record as of August 31, 2023.

title: The 3 Most Undervalued Momentum Stocks to Buy Now: August 2023

title: Cboe Global Markets Appoints Mandy Xu as Vice President and Head of Derivatives Market Intelligence
text: CHICAGO , Aug. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), the world's leading derivatives and securities exchange network, today announced Mandy Xu has joined the company as Vice President and Head of Derivatives Market Intelligence. In this role, Xu is planning to produce high-level insights and analysis on derivatives market themes and flows, with a focus on furthering client education on Cboe's markets and its leading suite of derivatives products.

title: Cboe Announces Winners of the Options Institute MSCI Inflation Research Grant
text: Dr. Ali Nejadmalayeri, Professor of Finance at the University of Wyoming College of Business, and William Campbell, Lecturer in Finance at the Wilbur O. and Ann Powers College of Business at Clemson University, named grant recipients Sponsored by MSCI, the grant will fund research on inflation and its impact on the markets CHICAGO , Aug. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Cboe Global Markets, Inc. title: CBOE Global (CBOE) Beats Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: CBOE Global (CBOE) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.78 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.76 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.67 per share a year ago.

title: Cboe reports 2Q profit jump on higher trading volumes
text: Cboe Global Markets reported a rise in its second quarter profits with the exchange operator saw higher trading volumes during the period as markets rebounded from last year.  Chicago-based Cboe - which operates four U.S.-listed cash equity options markets, including the largest options exchange in the country the Cboe Options Exchange – posted 2Q revenue of $468.1 million, a 10% increase from the same quarter last year.

title: Cboe Global Markets Reports Results for Second Quarter 2023
text: Second Quarter Highlights* Diluted EPS for the Quarter of $1.57 Adjusted Diluted EPS¹ for the Quarter of $1.78, Up 7 percent Net Revenue for the Quarter of $467.1 million, Up 10 percent Anticipates Higher End of Organic Total Net Revenue Growth2 Range of 7 to 9 percent in 2023; Reaffirms Data and Access Solutions Organic Net Revenue Growth Target2 of 7 to 10 percent Decreases 2023 Adjusted Operating Expense Guidance2 to $766 to $774 million, from $769 to $779 million. CHICAGO , Aug. 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE) today reported financial results for the second quarter of 2023.
